# diagnostics.edge_span_summary { #tslai.diagnostics.edge_span_summary }

```python
tslai.diagnostics.edge_span_summary(ts)
```

Summary of the tree-sequence edge-span distribution.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The tree sequence.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``median``, ``mean``, ``min``, ``max`` of the edge spans (float) and ``n_edges`` (int).
